hero.title: Our Story of Craftsmanship
hero.subtitle: Celebrating 12 years of excellence in premium bedding

body: Viritia is a premium bedsheet brand dedicated to transforming how people experience comfort and elegance at home.

Founded in 2014, Viritia emerged from a simple vision: to redefine premium bedding in India. What started as a passion for quality fabrics has grown into a trusted name synonymous with luxury, craftsmanship, and refined living.
Today, Viritia stands as a trusted name in premium home furnishings across India, bringing affordable luxury to discerning homes without compromising on quality or design.
brandIdentity.imageOverlay: Crafted for those who choose elegance.

difference.title: Premium Fabrics
difference.description: We source only the finest cotton and materials, ensuring every thread meets our exacting standards for softness, durability, and luxury.

difference.title: Design Excellence
difference.description: Our design team creates patterns and palettes that bring timeless sophistication to modern Indian homes.

difference.title: Quality Assurance
difference.description: Every Viritia product undergoes rigorous quality checks to ensure it meets the highest standards of craftsmanship.

testimonials.quote: The quality is unmatched. Every guest who visits comments on how beautiful our bedroom looks with Viritia sheets.
testimonials.name: Meera Iyer

testimonials.quote: I've tried many premium brands, but Viritia's sateen finish is on another level. Pure luxury.
testimonials.name: Arjun Malhotra

testimonials.quote: The embroidery collection is stunning. It's the perfect blend of tradition and modern elegance.
testimonials.name: Kavita Singh

packaging.title: Luxury Packaging
packaging.description: Every Viritia product arrives in premium packaging designed to make every purchase — and every gift — feel extraordinary.

coreValues.title: Quality First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on materials or craftsmanship. Every product reflects our obsession with excellence.

coreValues.title: Customer Centricity
coreValues.description: Our customers are at the heart of everything we do. Their comfort and satisfaction drive every decision.

coreValues.title: Sustainability
coreValues.description: We are committed to responsible sourcing and eco-conscious practices that respect our planet.

coreValues.title: Timeless Design
coreValues.description: We create products that transcend trends, offering enduring beauty and elegance for years to come.
